title: SEC Meeting With House Of Representative Committee On Finance
description: L-R  Head External Relations Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Mohammed Bagudu,  Head Accounts SEC Mr Abubakar Gaya, Executive Commissioner  Operations SEC Mr Dayo Obisan  and  Executive Commissi
html: L-R  Head External Relations Securities and Exchange Commission  Mr Mohammed Bagudu,  Head Accounts SEC Mr Abubakar Gaya, Executive Commissioner  Operations SEC Mr Dayo Obisan  and  Executive Commissioner  Corporate Services SEC Mr Ibrahim Boyi during a Meeting between the SEC and  House of Representatives  Committee on Finance at the National Assemby Abuja.
